description: Coaching tools: template system for coaches and clients, progress tracking, homework/task templates, session note templates, client intake forms, and enhanced action items with templates

userStories.title: Create coaching templates schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables to store reusable coaching templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Add coachingTemplates table: id, coachId (FK), title, description, category (enum: action_item, session_note, intake_form, homework), content (JSONB), isPublic (boolean, default false), createdAt, updatedAt
Add templateCategory enum: action_item, session_note, intake_form, homework
Add index on coachId and category
Generate and run migration
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: JSONB content stores template structure: for action items it's {items: [{title, description, dueOffsetDays}]}, for notes it's {sections: [{heading, placeholder}]}, for intake forms it's {fields: [{label, type, required}]}

userStories.title: Create platform-provided default templates
userStories.description: As a coach, I want pre-built templates available out of the box.
acceptanceCriteria: Create seed data or constants file with default templates
Action item templates: 'Weekly Reflection', 'Goal Setting Worksheet', 'Accountability Check-in'
Session note templates: 'First Session Intake', 'Progress Review', 'Goal Review Session'
Homework templates: 'Journaling Exercise', 'Strengths Assessment', 'Vision Board Planning'
Intake form templates: 'New Client Intake', 'Coaching Goals Assessment'
Store as system templates (coachId = null or special system ID)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: These are read-only platform templates. Coaches can duplicate them to customize.

userStories.title: Create template management page for coaches
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to create, edit, and manage my coaching templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /dashboard/templates/page.tsx with tabs by category
Show system templates (read-only) and coach's custom templates
Each template card shows: title, description, category badge, use count
Create button opens template editor dialog/page
Template editor: title, description, category select, content builder
Action item template builder: add/remove items with title, description, due offset
Session note template builder: add/remove sections with heading and placeholder
Duplicate button to copy system template into coach's own
Delete button for coach's own templates
Add Templates link to coach sidebar navigation
Create server actions: getTemplates, createTemplate, updateTemplate, deleteTemplate, duplicateTemplate
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply action item template when assigning tasks
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to use a template to quickly assign a set of action items to a client.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Use Template' button to the add action item dialog
Clicking shows a dropdown/modal of available action item templates
Selecting a template pre-fills the form with the template's items
Due dates calculated from template's dueOffsetDays relative to today
Coach can edit items before saving
Batch create: all items from template created at once
Create server action createActionItemsFromTemplate(clientId, templateId, overrides)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Action item creation is in action-items/actions.ts. Dialog is at src/components/action-items/add-action-item-dialog.tsx.

userStories.title: Apply session note template when writing notes
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to use a template to structure my session notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Use Template' dropdown to session notes editor
Selecting a template inserts structured sections into the notes textarea

Format: '## Section Heading
[placeholder text]

' for each section
Coach can edit freely after template is applied
Warn if overwriting existing notes content
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Session notes editor is at src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/sessions/[id]/coach-notes-editor.tsx. Notes stored as plain text in session_notes table.

userStories.title: Create client intake form system
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to send an intake form to new clients that they can fill out.
acceptanceCriteria: Add clientFormResponses table: id, templateId (FK), coachId, clientId, responses (JSONB), submittedAt, createdAt
Generate and run migration
Create server action sendIntakeForm(clientId, templateId) that creates a pending form response
Create server action submitFormResponse(responseId, responses) for client to submit
Create server action getClientForms(clientId) for coach to view submissions
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Intake form template content.fields has [{label, type: 'text'|'textarea'|'select'|'checkbox', options?, required}]

userStories.title: Create client intake form UI
userStories.description: As a client, I want to fill out intake forms assigned by my coach.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /dashboard/forms/[id]/page.tsx for client to fill out a form
Render form fields dynamically from template content
Support field types: text input, textarea, select dropdown, checkbox
Required field validation
Submit button saves responses
Show pending forms on client dashboard with notification badge
Coach can view completed responses on client profile page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Client profile page created in platform-ux-v2 PRD (US-011). Add forms tab there.

userStories.title: Add progress tracking to client profile
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to see a client's progress over time on their profile page.
acceptanceCriteria: Add progress section to /dashboard/clients/[clientId] page
Show timeline of: sessions completed (with dates), action items completed (with dates), forms submitted
Show completion rate: action items completed vs assigned (percentage + chart)
Show session frequency: sessions per month bar or visual
Show streak: consecutive weeks with at least one session
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on client profile page from platform-ux-v2 US-011. Query bookings, action_items, and clientFormResponses tables.

userStories.title: Enhanced client dashboard with coach assignments
userStories.description: As a client, I want to see homework, action items, and forms from my coach in a polished dashboard section.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'From Your Coach' section on client dashboard
Show pending action items with due dates and urgency colors
Show pending intake forms with 'Fill Out' button
Show recent coach notes/feedback if coach marks notes as shared (add isSharedWithClient boolean to session_notes)
Generate and run migration for isSharedWithClient column
Each item links to its detail page
Section shows coach avatar and name
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Client dashboard layout is at src/components/dashboard/client-dashboard-layout.tsx. Add new widget component.

userStories.title: Add homework template builder with rich content
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to create homework assignments with instructions, links, and checklists.
acceptanceCriteria: Homework template content supports: title, instructions (text), checklist items (array), resource links (array of {label, url})
Template editor has dedicated homework builder with sections for each
When assigned to client, creates action items for checklist items
Client sees homework as a grouped card with instructions + checklist + resources
Add 'Assign Homework' button on client profile page that uses homework templates
Create server action assignHomework(clientId, templateId, customizations)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Homework is built on top of action items but grouped together. Could use a homeworkAssignments linking table or a parentId on action_items.
